articles.title: Superfund Site Still On Track For Solar Power & Green Hydrogen
articles.summary: A Superfund site in New Mexico will soon host a 50-megawatt solar array, earmarked to produce green hydrogen for night-time clean power. The post Superfund Site Still On Track For Solar Power & Green Hydrogen appeared first on CleanTechnica .

articles.title: The EV Reformation At The Dealership Door
articles.summary: Seen through an Easter lens, the car dealership model looks a bit like the medieval Catholic church. articles.title: Port of LA turns to electric terminal trucks to to slash dwell times
articles.summary: APM Terminals has been electrifying its operations at the Port of Los Angeles over the last few years – and they’ve been able to effectively decarbonize and cut their fuel costs substantially. Those efforts have yielded another unexpected benefit, too: they’ve slashed truck idle times at the port by almost 85% . more…
